message:
fix(loader): prefer beads.jsonl over issues.jsonl for bd compatibility

Changed PreferredJSONLNames order to match bd (beads) behavior:
- Before: ["issues.jsonl", "beads.jsonl", "beads.base.jsonl"]
- After:  ["beads.jsonl", "issues.jsonl", "beads.base.jsonl"]

This fixes the issue where bv would watch issues.jsonl while bd in
stealth/direct mode writes to beads.jsonl, causing the viewer to miss
updates when both files exist in .beads/.

Closes #96

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
